MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF ANNA KOLLER'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY CESARI, WERNER & MORIARTY AND EXPERTS.

Motion To Transfer Venue, And Request For Relief Under Ccp 473
Off Calendar Aug-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DANIEL BRENT'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE, AND REQUEST FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 473 is denied. The motion is untimely. The record reflects that defendant did not obtain an extension of time to file the motion. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
